devto.instructions:
1. Go to dev.to Settings > Integrations > DEV Community API Keys
2. Generate a new API key
3. Add to this config as apiKey
4. Article draft ready at promotion/content/devto-article.md
devto.article_title: Open Code Review: The Missing Quality Gate for AI-Generated Code

reddit.instructions:
1. Create a 'script' app at reddit.com/prefs/apps
2. Get client_id and client_secret
3. Add to this config
4. Posts drafted for: r/programming, r/codesecurity, r/devops, r/javascript

hackernews.issue: HN temporarily restricting Show HN for low-karma accounts (as of 2026-03-13)
hackernews.recommendation: Build karma by commenting on discussions for 1-2 weeks, then submit Show HN. Alternatively try submitting as regular story.

twitter.instructions: Twitter API requires developer account. Consider posting manually.
